race.comment: CALL ME TERRY (2) ran on strongly only to just miss last start over 1200m at Dubbo. Should be near his peak for this. Faces an easier assignment so he is likely to play a big role. FRISKEE FROG (5) returns. Started the last campaign strong when in the placings over this trip at Canberra. Has switched to the Sharon Jeffries yard and can make a bright start for the new stable. ZAIBATSU (7) gets out over more ground today on the back of some solid form since winning at Narromine on December 2. Can take this out without surprising. CASTERLY ROCK (1) last appeared six weeks ago over 2000m at Gold Coast Poly when he finished fourth. This is his first run for the Clint Lundholm stable. May prove a bit sharp for him but is worth keeping safe with a slight class edge.
